heading: Transition funding
label: 1962 Transition funding
text: For the purposes of applying to Palau, the terms “fiscal year 1987”, “fiscal year 1988”, and “fiscal year 1989” in shall be deemed to be the first, second, and third fiscal years, respectively, beginning after the effective date of the Compact.section 1905(c)(2) of this titlesection 104(c) of Public Law 99–658
